note: Representative catalogue for the Sustainable Farming Assistant. Every concrete item recommended by the tools (agriculture.json) is stocked here. Prices are illustrative and editable.

products.name: Heirloom Tomato Seeds
products.blurb: Open-pollinated, full-flavour varieties that come back true year after year.

products.name: Blight-Resistant Tomato Seeds
products.blurb: Bred to shrug off late blight — ideal for damp summers.

products.name: Rainbow Carrot Seeds
products.blurb: A colourful mix of purple, yellow, and classic orange roots.

products.name: Carrot Fly-Resistant Seeds (Flyaway)
products.blurb: A less-susceptible cultivar that stands up to carrot fly.

products.name: Sugar Snap Pea Seeds
products.blurb: Crisp, sweet pods on vigorous climbing vines.

products.name: Broad Bean Seeds
products.blurb: Hardy nitrogen-fixers that enrich the soil as they grow.

products.name: Runner Bean Seeds
products.blurb: Heavy croppers for a sunny, sheltered spot.

products.name: Clubroot-Resistant Cabbage Seeds
products.blurb: Brassica variety bred to resist clubroot disease.

products.name: Broccoli Seeds
products.blurb: Reliable heads plus tender side-shoots over a long season.

products.name: Kale Seeds
products.blurb: Tough, productive leaves that sweeten after frost.

products.name: Lettuce Seed Mix
products.blurb: A cut-and-come-again blend for weeks of fresh salad.

products.name: Spinach Seeds
products.blurb: Fast, tender leaves that thrive in cooler conditions.

products.name: Beetroot Seeds
products.blurb: Sweet roots and edible leaves from an easy-going crop.

products.name: Onion Sets (pack)

products.name: Planting Garlic Bulbs
products.blurb: Plump cloves for autumn planting and summer harvest.

products.name: Certified Seed Potatoes, 2kg

products.name: Blueberry Bush

products.name: Stainless Hand Trowel

products.name: Hand Fork

products.name: Garden Twine
